news.t: WisdomTree Expands Defense ETF Suite with Launch of Global and Asia Defense Funds (WDGF and WDAF)

holdings.infoBox: WDGF is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Boeing Company stock at 5.28%, General Dynamics at 5.19%, Palantir Technologies at 5.15%, RTX Corporation at 5.11%, and BAE Systems at 5.09%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Global Defense Fund (WDGF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree Global Defense index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of companies engaged in the defense industry from around the world. Index constituents must have at least 25% revenue in defense-related activities and are weighted based on exposure. WDGF was launched on Sep 12, 2025 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree Expands Defense ETF Suite with Launch of Global and Asia Defense Funds (WDGF and WDAF)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree Expands Defense ETF Suite with Launch of Global and Asia Defense Funds (WDGF and WDAF).
